prestazioni: L15B7 (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (56 trim, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance. Supporting mods include a PRL Motorsports intercooler kit (bar-and-plate core, 50% larger than OEM) and a Tomei 80mm titanium blow-off valve (Type-S) to prevent compressor surge under aggressive shifts.

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, regulated by an AEM 320LPH external fuel pressure regulator. The stock L15B7 fuel rail is retained but ported for improved flow, while the ECU is reflashed with a Hondata FlashPro (GK5-specific calibration) to optimize AFR targeting 11.8:1 under boost (20 psi peak, tapering to 18 psi at redline).

Drivetrain and handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way, 40% preload) installed in the OEM GK5 torque vectoring differential housing, paired with a K-Tuned short shifter (55mm throw reduction) and a Fidanza 8.5lb aluminum flywheel. Suspension is fully rebuilt with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way rebound, 12-way compression damping) and GK5-specific Whiteline front sway bar (24mm hollow, adjustable end links) to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering. Braking is upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works GK5-specific widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper), molded in carbon fiber (2x2 twill weave) with OEM-spec Honda paint code NH-830M (Crystal Black Pearl). The kit includes a custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed ABS, adjustable angle) and a GT-style rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon, featuring dual 3-inch exhaust cutouts for the HKS Hi-Power exhaust system (titanium tips, 70mm diameter).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, GK5-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in Alcantara (Autostyle Japan, custom stitching in Honda Racing Red). The rear seats are removed and replaced with a custom aluminum floor panel (1.5mm thick, powder-coated matte black) to house a dual-battery setup (Optima YellowTop, 55Ah each) and a custom hydraulic jack system (Bilt Racing, 3-ton capacity). The steering wheel is replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm diameter, suede grip) featuring a GK5-specific airbag delete module by K-Tuned.

Aerodynamic enhancements include a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 50% weight reduction) with a functional NACA duct (3D-printed PETG, 80mm diameter) feeding the PRL intercooler. The OEM side mirrors are replaced with GK5-specific carbon fiber units by APR Performance (GT300 style, adjustable via electric motors) and a custom rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1700mm width, 3D-printed aluminum mounts) set at a 12-degree angle for optimal downforce (120kg at 120 mph). Lighting is upgraded to Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED bulbs (6500K) with GK5-specific DRL delete plates (carbon fiber, laser-etched Honda logo).
